summary: Rewired 'review create' from the dead /review/update_session_shelf_settings route to the legacy POST /review/update/:book_id form with named flags (--review, --spoiler, --publicize, --add-to-blog, --shelf, --notes, --authenticity-token).
reason: Generated command pointed at a transient shelf-table UI settings POST that does not write a review; the live capture documented the real review-write/publicize/spoiler form fields.
